nasb.text: For their mother has played the harlot; She who conceived them has acted shamefully. For she said, ‘I will go after my lovers, Who give me my bread and my water, My wool and my flax, my oil and my drink.’

esv.text: For their mother has played the whore; she who conceived them has acted shamefully. For she said, ‘I will go after my lovers, who give me my bread and my water, my wool and my flax, my oil and my drink.’

cnv.text: 因為他們的母親賣了淫， 懷他們的作了羞恥的事； 因為她曾說：‘我要跟隨我那些愛人。 我的餅和水， 羊毛和麻布，油和我所喝的，都是他們給的。’

ccb.text: 他们的母亲淫乱放荡，厚颜无耻， 她说，‘我要跟随我的情人， 他们给我食物和水、羊毛和麻布、油和酒。’
